annotation_target.structure: C section development antecedent — arpeggios continue, developmental momentum
teaching_goals: feel the developmental quality — moving forward with energy
style_tips: maintain the energy through the development

teaching_notes.note: The development has momentum — the arpeggios want to move forward.
technique: slight lean into each arpeggio group

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 33–36 of Fur Elise (Bagatelle No. 25 in A minor), view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 33–36 of Für Elise — how does the C section develop?
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 33–36.

Measures 33–36 continue the C section's development — the arpeggios continue their flowing character. The piece is in its most developmental episode here, far from the simple A theme oscillation. Let me loop mm. 33–36.
Für Elise mm. 33–36: C section development, flowing arpeggios, developmental character.
